title: The Last Bandit
writer: Thames Williamson, Luci Ward, Jack Natteford
actors: Bill Elliott, Lorna Gray, Forrest Tucker
plot: About to marry Jim Plummer, Kate Foley runs off to Nevada when Ed Bagley convinces her a quick fortune can be made robbing gold shipments that are being transported by the railroad. In Bannock City she meets reformed-bandit Frank ...
